Text.Page:
Hello? Excuse me?

Hi. I make this amazing—no really, amazing—soup with basilisk eyeballs. I know what you're going to say, but it's delicous!

Could you take this batch over to {@LinkCreature:222#1007$$Keslyn} before it gets cold? She really wants to try it.

I’ll consider cooking something up for you to show my appreciation.

Is this... Wow, this is the legendary basilisk eyeball soup everyone's raving about!

Mmm...and it’s still warm!

It's these little gestures that keep us all going through the madness, you know?
